exercises.code:
# skeptic audit S21-T2-A-E1
from pathlib import Path
from docx import Document

path = Path("informe.docx")
doc = Document()
doc.add_heading("Informe sintético", 0)
doc.add_heading("Resumen", 1)
doc.add_paragraph("Texto de ejemplo.")
doc.save(path)
raw = path.read_bytes()[:2]
reopened = Document(str(path))
texts = [p.text for p in reopened.paragraphs if p.text.strip()]
print(raw == b"PK", len(texts) > 0, "|", "Informe" in " ".join(texts), len(texts) > 0)

exercises.code:
# skeptic audit S21-T2-A-E2
from docx import Document

levels = [("Resumen", 1), ("Método", 2), ("Anexos", 1)]
doc = Document()
for text, level in levels:
    doc.add_heading(text, level)
doc.save("estructura.docx")
reopened = Document("estructura.docx")
styles = [p.style.name for p in reopened.paragraphs if p.style and p.style.name.startswith("Heading")]
h1 = sum(1 for s in styles if s == "Heading 1")
print(h1, "|", styles)

exercises.code:
# skeptic audit S21-T2-A-E3
from docx import Document

metrics = [("Ticket mediano", "28.0"), ("Reclamos", "—")]
doc = Document()
doc.add_heading("Auditoría", 1)
table = doc.add_table(rows=1, cols=2)
table.rows[0].cells[0].text = "métrica"
table.rows[0].cells[1].text = "valor"
for name, val in metrics:
    row = table.add_row().cells
    row[0].text = name
    row[1].text = val
doc.save("tabla.docx")
reopened = Document("tabla.docx")
t = reopened.tables[0]
cells = [[c.text for c in r.cells] for r in t.rows]
print(cells[1], "|", cells[2], "—" in cells[2][1] or cells[2][1] == "—")
exercises.justification_from_packet: Revisión escéptica de S21-T2-A-E3 (Documentos, plantillas y reportes trazables). Packet grounding: Jinja y separación datos/presentación + construyen tablas. exercises.code:
# skeptic audit S21-T2-B-E1
from pathlib import Path
from pypdf import PdfReader
from reportlab.pdfgen import canvas

path = Path("digital.pdf")
c = canvas.Canvas(str(path))
c.drawString(72, 760, "Resumen sintético")
c.save()
raw_ok = path.read_bytes()[:4] == b"%PDF"
reader = PdfReader(str(path))
text = "".join((p.extract_text() or "") for p in reader.pages)
print(raw_ok, "|", len(text.strip()) > 0)

exercises.code:
# skeptic audit S21-T2-B-E2
from pathlib import Path
import fitz
from reportlab.pdfgen import canvas

pdf, png = Path("render.pdf"), Path("render-p1.png")
c = canvas.Canvas(str(pdf))
c.drawString(72, 760, "Hallazgo")
c.save()
doc = fitz.open(str(pdf))
page = doc.load_page(0)
pix = page.get_pixmap()
pix.save(str(png))
doc.close()
print(png.exists() and png.stat().st_size > 0, pdf.exists())

exercises.code:
# skeptic audit S21-T2-B-E3
from pathlib import Path
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw
from pypdf import PdfReader
from reportlab.pdfgen import canvas

png, pdf = Path("scan.png"), Path("scan.pdf")
image = Image.new("RGB", (200, 80), "white")
draw = ImageDraw.Draw(image)
draw.text((10, 30), "SCAN", fill="black")
image.save(png)
c = canvas.Canvas(str(pdf))
c.drawImage(str(png), 72, 700, width=200, height=80)
c.save()
reader = PdfReader(str(pdf))
n_chars = len((reader.pages[0].extract_text() or "").strip())
print(png.exists(), pdf.read_bytes()[:4] == b"%PDF", "|", {"needs_ocr": n_chars == 0, "n_chars": n_chars})
